name: flow-09-ticket-issuance
description: T102 TicketIssuer + T103 TicketRedemptionValidator — PROCESSING archetype. Deterministic QR token = hash(tenantId+eventId+userId+purchaseId). Backward cross-wave: TicketIssued → FLOW-04 T63.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: deterministic-hash-token, no-random-uuid, cross-wave TicketIssued→FLOW-04
Retrieve PROCESSING arch pattern for T102-T103: deterministic hash token, cross-wave event emit
Break T102-T103 into: T102 compute QR = hash(tenantId+eventId+userId+purchaseId) → storeDocument → emit TicketIssued (→ FLOW-04 T63)
Generate ticket-issuer.service.ts — deterministic QR token = hash(tenantId+eventId+userId+purchaseId). Backward cross-wave: TicketIssued → FLOW-04 T63.
Named check validation: deterministic_hash_token, cross_wave_ticket_issued_flow04, no_random_uuid
Score generated code 0-100 against T102-T103 iron rules: deterministic token, cross-wave emit, redemption validation
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
